title: Copper Backport
description: Brings the Copper Age to older Minecraft versions by adding fully functional copper armor and tools, seamlessly balanced to fit vanilla progression. Experience the update early with authentic textures, stats, and crafting recipes that feel right at home.
body:
Experience the Copper Age in older Minecraft versions with this mod that adds fully functional copper armor and tools, faithfully designed to match vanilla balance and progression. Every item features authentic textures, sensible stats, and intuitive crafting recipes that fit naturally between existing tiers.

Perfect for survival worlds and modpacks alike, this mod blends seamlessly into the base game—no clutter, no overpowered gear, just a smooth and immersive expansion of Minecraft’s early-game technology. If you want more depth without changing the vanilla feel, this is the update you’ve been missing.
